summary:
The available evidence does not support a link between pectins and cold acclimation or deacclimation in winter oilseed rape plants. Pectins are discussed primarily in nutritional contexts unrelated to plant physiological adaptation to temperature changes.  

Note: This summary focuses only on clinically/physiologically relevant aspects pertinent to the query about crop response to cold exposure.
